contentList.content: A legendary ring imbued with the power to summon items from across the realms. Grants the ability to summon the Level 13 Plus Gear Chest and Boots of the Stormwalker.
Summon the Level 13 Plus Gear Chest at the target location. The chest contains powerful equipment for level 13+ characters.
Summon the Boots of the Stormwalker at the target location. These magical boots grant enhanced mobility and lightning resistance.
A simple test ring with no special properties. Used to verify the mod delivery system is working correctly.
